project_title: Evaluating the impact of the Cycling Demonstration Towns and Cycling Cities and Towns using the Office for National Statistics Longitudinal Study
datasets_used: Office for National Statistics: Longitudinal Study of England and Wales
sc_note: The domain was a clear assignment given that cycling, as a form of transport, fits well under the cateogyies of housing, residential condition and mobility, and planning. The purpose, however, was more ambiguous, because the title did not describe the outcome the project was evaluating for, it simply states "evaluating the impact of". However, based on the the fact that the implementation of cycling rules and regulations seem to fall under a policy/programme, intervention or institutional change and there is the word "impact" in the title, I've categorised it under "Policy Evaluation/Impact Analysis".
